'''bachozho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:ignoramo|ignoramo]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-ch-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ignoramo|ignoramo]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| bachozho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:bæchezheth|bæchezheth]] || [[word:bæchezhej|bæchezhej]] || [[word:bæchezhesh|bæchezhesh]] || [[word:bæchezhe|bæchezhe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:bachochozhoth|bachochozhoth]] || [[word:bachochozhoj|bachochozhoj]] || [[word:bachochozhosh|bachochozhosh]] || [[word:bachochozho|bachochozho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:bachozhoth|bachozhoth]] || [[word:bachozhoj|bachozhoj]] || [[word:bachozhosh|bachozhosh]] || [[word:bachozho|bachozho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:bachofzhoth|bachofzhoth]] || [[word:bachofzhoj|bachofzhoj]] || [[word:bachofzhosh|bachofzhosh]] || [[word:bachofzhof|bachofzhof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:bachozhotho|bachozhotho]] || [[word:bachozhojo|bachozhojo]] || [[word:bachozhosho|bachozhosho]] || [[word:bachozhoko|bachozhoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:bachozhoth|bachozhoth]] || [[word:bachozhoj|bachozhoj]] || [[word:bachozhosh|bachozhosh]] || [[word:bachozho|bachozho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:bachozhothol|bachozhothol]] || [[word:bachozhojol|bachozhojol]] || [[word:bachozhoshol|bachozhoshol]] || [[word:bachozhokol|bachozhokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:bachozhothotho|bachozhothotho]] || [[word:bachozhojojo|bachozhojojo]] || [[word:bachozhoshosho|bachozhoshosho]] || [[word:bachozhoko|bachozhoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:bachozhothon|bachozhothon]] || [[word:bachozhojon|bachozhojon]] || [[word:bachozhoshon|bachozhoshon]] || [[word:bachozhokon|bachozhokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:bachozhothoro|bachozhothoro]] || [[word:bachozhojoro|bachozhojoro]] || [[word:bachozhoshoro|bachozhoshoro]] || [[word:bachozhokoro|bachozhokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|386eaa0}}
